title: Crispy Canadian Beef Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly dish featuring tender Canadian beef stir-fried in a floral broth and served as a crispy appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Beef cubes
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's lean and cubed for easy stir-frying.

ingredients.name: Broth (vegetable or low-sodium)
ingredients.notes: Use a floral-flavored broth if available, otherwise use standard vegetable stock.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce or tamari (optional)
ingredients.notes: Use sparingly, as it can add sodium.

ingredients.name: Capsicum peppers (optional for color and texture)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add garlic cloves and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Place beef cubes in the pan and stir-fry for 4-5 minutes or until golden brown on all sides.
Pour in broth and let it simmer for another 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
If desired, garnish with chopped cilantro before serving. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables if needed.

To make the dish crispy, after the stir-fry is done, use paper towels to blot excess moisture from beef and then drizzle with melted butter or coconut oil and sprinkle with crushed nuts (almonds are a good choice) for added crunch.
